sum: Goth-themed portrait and paperdoll replacements for BG2 NPCs. Includes alternate portraits by multiple artists and cross-mod NPC support.
no: Goth-themed portrait and paperdoll replacements for BG2 NPCs. Features alternate portraits by multiple artists with a distinctive dark aesthetic.

co.n: New Portraits and Changed Paperdoll Colours
co.tp2n: New Portraits and Changed Paperdoll Colours
